description: An agent must parse an unstructured email from a client and turn it into a structured project timeline.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the email text to extract key tasks and their deadlines.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies tasks like 'Finish the design by next Friday' and 'Launch the site by the end of the month'.

nodes.task_description: Format the extracted tasks and dates into a structured list.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a clean, structured list of tasks and deadlines.

nodes.task_description: Generate a simple timeline visualization based on the list.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a visual timeline of the project.
